Home/Agents/Chat & Support/WhatsApp Business Agent
Chat Agent

WhatsApp Business Agent

A WhatsApp Business Agent handles customer conversations end-to-end inside WhatsApp: catalog browsing, order taking, payment collection, order tracking, and support — without a human agent for 80% of queries. Starting at ₹1.25L setup + ₹15k/month.

Starting at
₹1.25L–2.5L setup + ₹15k/mo $2.5k–5k setup + $300/mo
Languages
Hindi · English · Tamil · Telugu · Kannada
Built For
D2C brandsRestaurants & cloud kitchensService businessesRetailReal estate

How it works.

01

Customer messages your number

New inquiry, support question, or order follow-up.

02

Agent responds instantly

Identifies intent (buy / track / support / general) and routes the conversation.

03

Task completed

Order built. Payment link sent. Tracking number shared. Complaint logged.

04

CRM sync

Every interaction logged. New customers added. Orders tracked.

ROI Math
Without

Human agent: handles 50–80 chats/day, 9am–6pm, 6 days/week.

→
With Amoris

WhatsApp Agent: handles 500+ chats/day, 24/7, with consistent quality.

80% of customer queries resolved without human involvement.

FAQ

Common questions about WhatsApp Business Agent.

How much does a WhatsApp chatbot cost in India?
Setup ranges from ₹1.25L to ₹2.5L. Monthly retainer is ₹15k, covering hosting and up to 5,000 conversations/month.
Is this a button-based bot or does it understand natural language?
Natural language. Customers type what they want and the agent understands. No confusing numbered menus.
Can it take payments inside WhatsApp?
Yes. With Razorpay or PayU integration, the agent sends a payment link inside the chat. Customer pays without leaving WhatsApp.
What about customers who want to speak to a human?
The agent detects frustration or explicit human requests and transfers to a human agent with full conversation context.
Does it work for regional language customers?
Yes. Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, and English in the same conversation. Customer can switch languages mid-chat.

Ready to deploy WhatsApp Business Agent?

Book a 30-minute discovery call. We'll scope your use case and give you a cost on the call.
